title: M&SENSE Apple Crumble Large Soy Scented Candles Gifts for Women 400g 75H Non Toxic Organic Home Fragrance Candle for Spa Relaxing Strong Men's Scented Candles Long Burning
features: Cinnamon and apple meet apple blossom and caramel. This gourmand scent is pure comfort food in a bottle.

Pastoralism Pattern Reusable Jar - This candle jar showcases pastoral patterns, evoking countryside beauty. It's not just for candles, but also doubles as a vase. Ideal for adding rustic elegance to your space.

Natural Scents, More Choices - We offer a rich variety of scents for our candle jars, ensuring that you can always find the one that resonates with you most. Each scent is infused with natural essential oils, guaranteeing an authentic and long-lasting fragrance experience.

Clean Even Burning - M&SENSE candles employ American cotton flat braid wicks with paper throughout. It burns more consistently than 100% cotton wicks. One candle requires three times of manual pouring of natural soy wax, which makes the wax more even and burns well.

Various Scents for Many Gift Occasions - This scented candle is delivered in an elegant gift box, making it a perfect gift for women or men! Suitable for any occasion: Christmas, Happy Birthday, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Anniversary Gift, Thanksgiving Day, Valentine's Day
